breaches.label: CNCG
breaches.source: 277 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 1,068 60d med = 321 sh cap) (86% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 35,000 out = 12,250 sh cap) (2% of cap)
breaches.action: Trim ~21 sh on CNCG toward warn band (277 sh short vs 321 sh median vol (30% × 1,068 60d med = 321 sh cap)).

breaches.label: FBYY
breaches.source: 1,594 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 600 60d med = 180 sh cap) (886% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 30,001 out = 10,500 sh cap) (15% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~1,450 sh on FBYY to reach warn band (1,414 sh over median vol (30% × 600 60d med = 180 sh cap)).

breaches.label: HMYY
breaches.source: 986 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 2,971 60d med = 891 sh cap) (111% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 110,001 out = 38,500 sh cap) (3% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~273 sh on HMYY to reach warn band (95 sh over median vol (30% × 2,971 60d med = 891 sh cap)).

breaches.label: MAAY
breaches.source: 7,695 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 9,800 60d med = 2,940 sh cap) (262% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~5,343 sh on MAAY to reach warn band (4,755 sh over median vol (30% × 9,800 60d med = 2,940 sh cap)).

breaches.label: MTYY
breaches.source: 9,980 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 4,381 60d med = 1,314 sh cap) (759% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 84,982 out = 29,744 sh cap) (34% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~8,929 sh on MTYY to reach warn band (8,666 sh over median vol (30% × 4,381 60d med = 1,314 sh cap)).

indices.description: T+0: instantaneous portfolio β×ΔSPX. 1M–12M: horizon-scaled equity shock (rms) + LETF decay/borrow. 12M-terminal row uses full labeled ΔSPX. Historical rows integrate piecewise SPX paths.

vix_decay_matrix.description: Expected net book carry over the next 12 months at SPX 0%, with forecast vol adjusted by vol elasticity (v3 log-log), variance decomposition, optional spike-revert path integral, and VIX-stressed borrow on short legs.

bucket_sleeve_panel.capital_reason: capital_snapshot missing from totals.json (run EOD after upgrade)
bucket_sleeve_panel.exposure_note: Exposure gross/net = delta-normalized (β × notional). Deployed capital = signed MV on etf_screened_today (screener universe). B3 is a flow overlay; B4 gross is ratio-split (pair-view in bucket detail).

borrow_shock_panel.note: Annualized carry = Σ |short notional| × borrow APR on held short ETFs. Shocks are applied to every leg's current APR; incremental = shocked − current.

shared_underlying_panel.note: Underlyings appearing in more than one accounting bucket share a single broker spot line that nets across sleeves; B4 attribution slices it.
